about.title: Engineering Warmth Since 2002
about.intro: Founded in 2002, Jiuding Radiator is a professional manufacturer of steel radiators, designer radiators, and heated towel rails based in Tianjin, China. With over 20 years of experience and exports to 80+ countries, we are a trusted OEM/ODM partner for distributors and project developers worldwide.
about.h2005: First export orders to Eastern Europe
about.landmarkIntro: Jiuding radiators are installed in some of China's most iconic buildings and trusted by 300+ distributors including B&Q (百安居) and Red Star Macalline.

cases.title: Trusted by projects worldwide.
cases.intro: From residential apartments to luxury hotels, Jiuding radiators have been installed in projects across Europe, Central Asia, the Middle East and beyond.

credentials.title: Certifications, Patents & Trademarks
credentials.intro: Jiuding holds internationally recognized certifications, 42 national patents, and 12 registered trademarks — the credentials behind two decades of trusted manufacturing.
credentials.ceIntro: Tested by HEATEST s.r.o. (Notified Body NB 2693, Czech Republic) under EU Regulation 305/2011.
credentials.cePanel: Steel Panel Radiators — 4 types certified (Panel 11, 21, 22, 33), issued February 2024
credentials.ceColumn: Steel Column Radiators — 6 types certified (JDDH D/S 5025, JDDH D/S 7015, JDWY CH 22Y, JDWY DHE 6015), issued March 2023
credentials.ukcaIntro: Thermal performance validated by BSRIA (Building Services Research and Information Association, UK).
credentials.patentIntro: Granted by CNIPA (China National Intellectual Property Administration). Patent holder: Tianjin Jiuding Yangguang HVAC Co., Ltd.
credentials.patentDesign: 6 granted design patents — radiator side covers (JD11, JDG1), spiral matrix column, wall bracket, floor stand, end cap (3-column)
credentials.patentUtility: 2 utility model patents — radiator cover plate system, pressure-adjustable radiator
credentials.patentPending: 3 applications pending — tube gap grinding fixture, metal tube flanging structure, end cap (2-column)
credentials.patentInvention: 2 invention patents + 30 utility models + 10 design patents (42 total, per official records)
credentials.tmIntro: All Class 11 (heating, lighting, cooling, water supply equipment).

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.intro: Common questions from distributors, contractors, and B2B buyers about Jiuding radiators.
faq.q1: What certifications do Jiuding radiators have?
faq.a1: All Jiuding radiators are CE-certified under EN 442 (EU Construction Products Regulation), with thermal performance validated by BSRIA (UK) for UKCA compliance. We also hold ISO 9001 quality management certification. Every unit is pressure-tested at 1.5× working pressure before shipping.
faq.q2: What is your annual production capacity?
faq.a2: Our 45,000 m² factory in Tianjin produces over 4 million radiator sections per year across 8 automated production lines, covering 6 product series with 600+ specifications.
faq.a3: Yes. We provide full OEM/ODM support including custom sizes, RAL color matching, private-label branding, custom packaging, and product engineering. We currently serve partners in 20+ countries with private-label products.
faq.q4: What is the minimum order quantity (MOQ)?
faq.a4: MOQ varies by product type and customization level. For standard models, MOQ starts from 1 x 20GP container. For custom OEM orders, please contact our sales team for specific requirements.
faq.q5: Which countries do you export to?
faq.a5: We export to 20+ countries including the UK, Germany, France, Italy, Belgium, Russia, Kazakhstan, Georgia, Armenia, and across Central Asia, the Middle East, and South America. Our products are installed in B&Q China stores and major construction projects.
faq.q6: What product types do you manufacture?
faq.a6: We manufacture 6 series: steel panel radiators (our main product line), steel column radiators, copper-aluminum composite radiators, steel tube/welded radiators, bathroom heated towel rails, and electric towel rails — totaling 38 categories and 600+ specifications.
faq.q7: What is the typical lead time?
faq.a7: Standard products: 15–25 days after order confirmation. OEM/custom orders: 30–45 days depending on specifications and quantity. We provide full export documentation, container loading plans, and logistics coordination.
faq.q8: How many patents does Jiuding hold?
faq.a8: Jiuding holds 42 national patents granted by CNIPA: 2 invention patents, 30 utility model patents, and 10 design patents, covering radiator structures, manufacturing processes, and product designs.
faq.q9: What landmark projects have your radiators been installed in?
faq.a9: Our radiators have been installed in the Tiananmen and Forbidden City renovation, Beijing Daxing International Airport, the Central Party School of CPC, 2008 Beijing Olympics venues, and many more. We are a strategic partner of Poly Real Estate and distribute through B&Q China (百安居) and Red Star Macalline (红星美凯龙).
faq.q10: How do I become a distributor?
faq.a10: Contact us at kevin@jdradiator.com with your company profile, target market, and expected volumes. We offer exclusive distribution agreements, marketing support, competitive pricing, and dedicated account management.

collaborate.title: Let's Grow Together
collaborate.lead: Jiuding partners with distributors, contractors, and businesses worldwide. Whether you need OEM radiator production, regional distribution, or project-based supply — we're ready to collaborate.
collaborate.exportDesc: Steel radiators, designer radiators, towel rails, and bimetal models shipped to 30+ countries. Flexible MOQ, full certification (CE / UKCA / EN442).
collaborate.oemDesc: Custom branding, packaging, and specifications. From design to delivery, our 50,000 m² factory handles it all.
collaborate.distributorDesc: Become our exclusive distributor in your market. We provide marketing support, competitive pricing, and fast lead times.
collaborate.accessoriesDesc: Valves, brackets, fittings, and installation kits available alongside radiator orders.
collaborate.formLead: Interested in working with us? Leave your details and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
